violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean racks that hold taco shells. -Clean shelf under microwave.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. -Clean racks used for storing clean dishes.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors need more cleaning in kitchen, floor drains and walk in cooler.
Receptacles, covers/lids, adequate number, clean, insect/rodent proof, storage, frequency, maintained (1 pt deducted)
